message:
test(output): add comprehensive rules renderer tests + formatting fixes

Adds 12 unit tests covering the rules rendering pipeline:

- RulesListRenderer: plain, no-ANSI, JSON, empty, and verbose modes
- RulesTestRenderer: plain, no-ANSI, JSON, and no-matches modes
- RuleDetailRenderer: plain, no-ANSI, and JSON modes

Each test validates structural output (correct fields, formatting) and
ANSI cleanliness in plain mode (assert_no_ansi helper).

Also applies minor formatting fixes from rustfmt: collapses multi-line
method chains, reformats format!() arguments, and simplifies
is_some_and() call layout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
